---
title: "Henry Anderson Morshead"
---

## Henry Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (1848/9-1876)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Son of Captain Pentyre Anderson Morshead and  brother of Mary Anderson Morshead [1861 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
